# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.31.9 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~116k production LoC across 179 files (incl. NEW `rust/sele4n-hal/src/per_cpu_stats.rs` from SM1.I.4 + `SeLe4n/Kernel/Architecture/TlbiForSharing.lean` from SM1.E.4); ~22k test LoC across 30 suites (`tests/SmpFoundationsSuite.lean` extended at SM1.I with +6 surface anchors + 5 runtime assertions covering idle-wait + per-core stats markers); 3,370 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 592 host unit tests + 1 ignored (`sm1g3_cross_core_kprintln_stress` placeholder) (was 510 pre-SM1.I; +82 SM1.I tests across per_cpu_stats/trap/cpu/ffi/smp modules including audit-pass-2/3/4 defense-in-depth + wrap + truncation + invocation + race-fix tests) + 94 ABI conformance tests.
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.
- **Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.31.7 → v0.31.8 → v0.31.9 → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3; **SM1 (Rust HAL) CLOSED at v0.31.8** with all nine sub-phases LANDED (SM1.A through SM1.I; 61 total sub-tasks). **Phase SM2.A (Abstract memory model — `MemoryOrder`, `MemoryEvent`, `MemoryTrace`, `wellFormed`, `eventPos`, `synchronizesWith`, `sequencedBefore`, `happensBefore`, and the four happens-before partial-order theorems — `_irreflexive`, `_transitive`, `_antisymmetric`, aggregate `happens_before_partial_order`) LANDED at v0.31.9** — the foundation that SM2.B (TicketLock) and SM2.C (RwLock) release-acquire pairing proofs consume. 12 sub-tasks in one cut: `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/MemoryModel.lean` (~930 LoC; zero `axioms`, zero `sorries`; 34 exported theorems including 4 canonical partial-order witnesses + 8 helper-theorem lifters for SM2.B/SM2.C consumers; non-strict `≤` per-core seqNum monotonicity to support ARMv8.1-A LSE RMW operations per the plan's two-event commentary; `tests/MemoryModelSuite.lean` with 50 runtime assertions + 64 surface anchors + 39 decidable examples). Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM2 sub-plan: [`SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases: SM2.B (TicketLock spec + Rust impl), SM2.C (RwLock spec + Rust impl), SM2.D (FFI + integration), SM2.E (documentation) + SM3..SM9 → closure cut at v1.0.0.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
- **Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).

Specification documents:

- **seLe4n project spec:** [`docs/spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md`](../spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md) -- normative scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria.
- **seL4 microkernel reference:** [`docs/spec/SEL4_SPEC.md`](../spec/SEL4_SPEC.md) -- detailed summary of the original seL4 kernel semantics.
